category_sources: source_facts.description says this CLI installs, manages, and troubleshoots Kubernetes clusters running Cilium.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cilium-cli; official Cilium docs refer to the command-line tool as the Cilium CLI.
docs_sources: Official Cilium documentation at docs.cilium.io covers installing the Cilium CLI.
source_facts.repo points to the official cilium/cilium-cli repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/cilium/cilium-cli; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Kubernetes cluster management and troubleshooting for Cilium.
